---
title: Bruges
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061335/bruges_cvvxn3.png
description: Bruges
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2026/03/06
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061335/bruges_cvvxn3.png)
